query:
SELECT 
  rp.categoryId,
  rp.feedItemId,
  rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay,
  COUNT(*) AS duplicateCount,
  MIN(rp.id) AS keepId,
  MAX(rp.id) AS maxId
FROM ration_plans rp
WHERE rp.deletedAt IS NULL AND rp.isActive = 1
GROUP BY rp.categoryId, rp.feedItemId, rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY duplicateCount DESC;
